news-korea-econ.title: Trump pushed NATO to spend big — now comes the harder question: Can Europe actually fight?
news-korea-econ.description: NATO defense spending hits Cold War highs after pressure from Trump and Russia's war in Ukraine, but experts say real military capability still lags.

news-global-econ.title: Is farm-raised fish really worse than wild-caught seafood? Experts sounds off
news-global-econ.description: Wild-caught vs. farm-raised fish: Experts weigh in on omega-3 content, mercury levels, labeling confusion and how to choose the best seafood option.

news-global-econ.title: CNBC anchor thinks CEOs are 'very scared' to criticize Trump because the fear of retaliation
news-global-econ.description: CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin told '60 Minutes' he believes a crash will happen, comparing current conditions to 1929 as CEOs stay silent on Trump policies.

news-global-econ.title: Trump-backed candidates score major boost from deep-pocketed AI Super PAC in upcoming primaries
news-global-econ.description: A pro-AI super PAC with over $125 million raised in 2025 is investing heavily in upcoming Senate and House primaries across multiple states.

news-global-econ.title: Trump understands what Washington politicians forgot: Cuba is a major threat to America
news-global-econ.description: Trump's Cuba strategy targets GAESA sanctions, Raul Castro's indictment, and the LIBERTAD Act to confront the regime as a threat to American security.

news-global-soc.title: Inside Cuba’s foreign influence campaign: From the Venceremos Brigade of the 1960s to Saturday in a union hall
news-global-soc.description: Federal officials are probing Cuban Embassy diplomat David Ramírez Álvarez for allegedly coordinating a malign foreign influence campaign on U.S. soil.

news-global-soc.title: The day after Memorial Day, America’s debt to the fallen still remains
news-global-soc.description: Memorial Day asks Americans to confront a hard truth: freedom was built through sacrifice, and honoring the fallen requires more than remembrance.

news-global-soc.title: Stocks pare gain, oil climbs as US strikes Iran: Markets Wrap
news-global-soc.description: The dollar strengthened against all its Group-of-10 peers, while gold erased earlier gains to fall 0.5% to about $4,545 an ounce

news-global-soc.title: Quad diplomats meet in New Delhi to revive group after Trump tension

news-global-soc.title: Jacob Frey criticized for remembering George Floyd on Memorial Day, six years after death sparked riots
news-global-soc.description: Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey receives pushback for his social media post remembering George Floyd on Memorial Day, the sixth anniversary of his death.
